stem: A weather balloon rises into the atmosphere. The graph shows the estimated volume y, in cubic meters, of the balloon when its altitude is x kilometers, where the line passes through (2, 100), (4, 250), and (6, 400). What is the estimated volume, in cubic meters, of the balloon when its altitude is 4 kilometers?
rationale: Choice A is correct. The graph shows (4, 250), so when x = 4, y = 250.
